intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1 (matrix.mtx.gz, barcodes.tsv.gz, features.tsv.gz). Using scanpy, do standard QC, normalization, highly-variable genes, PCA, neighbors, Leiden clustering and a UMAP, then identify marker genes per cluster and show me a UMAP and a marker dotplot.

blocks.text: Good, I can see the GSM5746268 sample files. Let me load the data and run the standard scanpy workflow:

input.code:
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from pathlib import Path
import os

# Set up paths
sample_prefix = "GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1"
matrix_path = f"{DATA_DIR}/{sample_prefix}.matrix.mtx.gz"
barcodes_path = f"{DATA_DIR}/{sample_prefix}.barcodes.tsv.gz"
features_path = f"{DATA_DIR}/{sample_prefix}.features.tsv.gz"

# Load the 10x matrix triplet
print(f"Loading 10x data for {sample_prefix}...")
adata = sc.read_mtx(matrix_path).T  # Transpose to get cells x genes
adata.obs_names = pd.read_csv(barcodes_path, header=None)[0].values
adata.var_names = pd.read_csv(features_path, sep='\t', header=None)[1].values

print(f"Data loaded: {adata.shape}")
print(f"Cells: {adata.n_obs}, Genes: {adata.n_vars}")
print(f"\nFirst few genes: {adata.var_names[:10].tolist()}")
print(f"\nFirst few cell barcodes: {adata.obs_names[:5].tolist()}")
print(f"\nData type: {adata.X.dtype}")
print(f"Sparsity: {1 - adata.X.nnz / (adata.n_obs * adata.n_vars):.2%}")
